_doc: Progress manifest for Email Performance Layer autoresearch loop. Flip `done: true` when a feature is implemented AND smoke-tested. Composite score = (9 - verify_tags_remaining) + p0_done * 2.

features.name: Email list KPI strip
features.note: Sent/Delivered/Open/CTR/TopLink inline in every row. Delta-pp chips vs benchmark.

features.name: Performance panel expandable
features.note: Click-to-expand per row. Shows top links + placeholders for regional/cohort.

features.name: Regional splits tab
features.note: Region column in row + region filter pill. NULL→'Unknown' bucket handled per [VERIFY] resolution.

features.name: Databricks ingestion job
features.note: Standalone script written; seed JSON written to kb-data/intelligence/email-perf-live.json with 24 real emails from Databricks MCP smoke test.

features.name: Cache/storage layer
features.note: File-based JSON cache (consistent with metrics-live/roasters-insights pattern). 3 endpoints live and smoke-tested at :3737.

features.name: Cohort splits tab
features.note: UI renders 4-cell cohort grid (New/Active/Dormant/Unknown). Data layer returns NULL cohorts until the SubscriberKey→dimbeanzsubscription join path is finalised (dimbeanzcustomeremail.CustomerEmail is an email hash, not a SubscriptionId). Tracked as data-quality follow-up.

features.name: Link-level breakdown tab
features.note: Top link column in row + full top-5 list in expanded panel. Uses ClickURL (not URL) per [VERIFY] resolution. Current snapshot has no click rows — will populate on next refresh.
